verifier_issues.description: Methods note includes a reproducibility snippet but no separate runnable notebook or script artifact was produced. This limits verification of end-to-end reproducibility (the deterministic precheck and CSV are present and consistent, but a runnable artifact would be required to fully reproduce the pipeline).
verifier_issues.suggested_fix: Provide a runnable notebook or script (e.g., Jupyter notebook or .py) that ingests the embedded packet and produces the CSV to enable full reproducibility.

verifier_issues.description: Methods note and CSV do not document a tie-breaking rule for equal weighted driver_term values. Grader notes this omission (no example rows exhibit ties, but requirement asks for explicit rule).
verifier_issues.suggested_fix: Add an explicit tie-breaking rule in methods_note.md (for example, prefer the driver with deterministic ordering by metric name or use lexicographic tie-break) and, if possible, include a unit test/example demonstrating the rule.

extra_model_fields.verifier_issues_summary: Grader evidence is grounded in the provided artifact previews and trace; scores and justifications are internally consistent. Two minor issues: (1) end-to-end reproducibility cannot be fully validated because a separate runnable notebook/script artifact was not provided (methods_note contains a snippet but no runnable artifact), and (2) the methods note does not state a tie-breaking rule for equal weighted drivers (grader calls this out). No hidden-reference leakage detected.

metadata_json.public_response_summary: Model verifier checked grounding and score consistency.

extra_model_fields.notes: All grader claims relevant to computed columns, formulas, and verdicts are supported by the CSV and methods_note previews. The deterministic artifact-contract precheck is consistent with the provided artifacts. Remaining weaknesses are implementation-level (missing runnable artifact) and documentation-level (tie-break rule and per-record provenance columns), correctly called out by the grader.
extra_model_fields.recommended_action: Request a runnable notebook/script artifact and a short update to methods_note.md to include tie-breaking and per-record provenance columns to reach full reproducibility and remove remaining minor findings.

extra_model_fields.verifier_issues_summary: All grader evidence is grounded in provided artifact previews and the execution trace; scores and claims are consistent and no hidden-reference leakage was detected.

metadata_json.public_response_summary: Model verifier checked grounding and score consistency.

extra_model_fields.evidence_grounding_notes: Grader evidence_refs point to the CSV and methods_note, both of which are present in actual_outputs and in artifact content previews. The agent_trace steps document reading task.json, computing values, writing the CSV and methods_note, and persisting agent_trace.json. Sample recomputations cited in the grader (e.g., R1 weighted components and margin) match the CSV preview rows.
extra_model_fields.reproducible_notes: Methods note contains the full formula, sensitivity-shift procedure, and a script-equivalent code snippet. The CSV includes intermediate drivers and margins. The grader's reproducibility caveat (no separate runnable script artifact attached) is noted but does not contradict reproducibility of the documented algorithm from the provided artifacts.
extra_model_fields.score_consistency_notes: final_score=0.9 is supported by the raw_llm_output and raw_model_output fields and consistent with deterministic precheck artifact_contract_score=1.0 and semantic deduction that produced a 0.9 semantic score. The grader's limitations and suggested improvements explain the 0.1 deduction (missing runnable script, tie-breaking docs, rounding rules), which is consistent with the artifact contents and trace.
extra_model_fields.unsupported_claims_notes: No claims in the grader result depend on hidden data; limitations are explicitly stated and are supported by absence of a separate runnable script artifact and by minor numeric rounding notes visible in margin_plus5/minus5 fields.

raw_llm_output.verifier_issues_summary: All grader evidence is grounded in provided artifact previews and the execution trace; scores and claims are consistent and no hidden-reference leakage was detected.
